scripts.dev: bash scripts/sync-env.sh && bun run --filter '@storage/shared' build && bun run --filter '@storage/backend' --filter '@storage/frontend' dev
scripts.dev:backend: bash scripts/sync-env.sh && bun run --filter '@storage/shared' build && bun run --filter '@storage/backend' dev
scripts.build: bun run --filter '@storage/shared' build && bun run --filter '@storage/backend' build && bun run --filter '@storage/frontend' build
